title: Code Explainer
description: A technical teaching template with code typing, diff highlights, decoded terminology, and a measurable result card.

source.name: iPolloWork · HyperFrames
source.attribution: Original iPolloWork composition inspired by HyperFrames code animation and text effect patterns.

applyChecklist: Replace the question, code label, result, and metric with a real technical narrative.
Keep code lines large enough for video and use the diff highlight only for the changed lines.
Sequence the code reveal with the explanation instead of showing the entire answer at once.
Verify that all code remains readable in the rendered contact sheet.
